originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&len` is never used.

presenceCondition:
(and (= ENABLE_FEATURE_HTTPD_GZIP true)
     (= ENABLE_FEATURE_HTTPD_BASIC_AUTH true)
     (= BB_MMU true))
model:
(define-fun BB_MMU () Bool
  true)
(define-fun ENABLE_FEATURE_HTTPD_GZIP () Bool
  true)
(define-fun ENABLE_FEATURE_HTTPD_BASIC_AUTH () Bool
  true)
reasoning: send_headers(): `len` accumulates sprintf return values at L25, L30 (BASIC_AUTH=T), L36 (GZIP=T), but the final printf at L38 uses iobuf directly — len is never used after its last assignment. Dead store. GZIP=T required (content_gzip must be declared for L35 to compile). BASIC_AUTH=T and BB_MMU=T are not required; dead store exists for any compilable GZIP=T config. No '// ERROR' → new bug not in VBDB. PC is over-constrained. Classification: TRUE_NEW_OVER.
